content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/tests/test_app.py:1	import pytest2	from app import app3	from database import db, init_db4	from models import URL5	6	@pytest.fixture7	def client():8	    app.config['TESTING'] = True9	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///:memory:'10	    11	    with app.test_client() as client:12	        with app.app_context():13	            init_db()14	        yield client15	16	def test_index_page(client):17	    """Test that the index page loads."""18	    response = client.get('/')19	    assert response.status_code == 20020	    assert b'URL Shortener' in response.data21	22	def test_shorten_url(client):23	    """Test shortening a URL."""24	    response = client.post('/', data={'url': 'https://www.google.com'}, follow_redirects=True)25	    assert response.status_code == 20026	    assert b'Shortened URL:' in response.data27	    28	    with app.app_context():29	        url_entry = URL.query.filter_by(original_url='https://www.google.com').first()30	        assert url_entry is not None31	32	def test_redirect_to_url(client):33	    """Test redirecting from a short URL to the original URL."""34	    with app.app_context():35	        url_entry = URL(original_url='https://www.python.org', short_id='py')36	        db.session.add(url_entry)37	        db.session.commit()38	        short_id = url_entry.short_id39	40	    response = client.get(f'/{short_id}')41	    assert response.status_code == 30242	    assert response.location == 'https://www.python.org'
